name: JavaScript Core
description: Pop the hood of the runtime. Master closures, prototypes, and execution context to understand exactly how your code behaves

name: JavaScript Extended
description: Unlock the modern standard library. Harness Generators, Proxies, and Maps to write cleaner, more expressive ES6+ code

name: Asynchronous Programming
description: Conquer the event loop. Master promises, queues, and async flows to build non-blocking apps that never freeze

name: Algorithms & Data Structures
description: Ace the technical interview. Drill essential patterns like sliding windows and binary trees to solve complex problems with confidence

name: Design Patterns
description: Structure code like an architect. Implement battle-tested patterns like Singleton and Observer to build scalable systems
